title: ochna patens
intro: Ochna patens, also known as Mickey Mouse plant, is a deciduous shrub native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ochna patens include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and prevent the growth of certain bacteria. Herbal preparations of Ochna patens can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions.
